title: Stage 19 Prerelease Creation

messages.completed: Stage 19 prerelease creation completed and recorded the prerelease link.
messages.blocked: Stage 19 prerelease creation was blocked by the external release engine and recorded the reason.

next_actions.completed: Proceed into Stage 19B published prerelease retest using the real released asset for this host.
next_actions.blocked: Run Stage 20 release-notes assembly or resolve the external prerelease blocker, then retry Stage 19.

handoff_summaries.completed: Stage 19 prerelease creation completed with a recorded tag and prerelease location.
handoff_summaries.blocked: Stage 19 prerelease creation blocked and captured the release-engine failure for follow-up.

prerelease_posture: Use the existing release engine instead of inventing a second prerelease path.
If the release engine blocks, record the exact blocker rather than hiding it behind a generic failure.
Keep the prerelease packet small and factual so later stages can communicate it cleanly.
summary_expected_next_step: If blocked, repair the release-note or auth issue before retrying prerelease creation. If successful, validate the published artifact directly in Stage 19B before PR progression.
